name: Maple Hollow Community Schools
one_liner: A bright, playful K-12 public school district website with a sunny pastel palette, chunky rounded typography, and medium-density binder-style layouts for school finder, calendars, parent portal, board, news, and lunch menus.

implementation.stack: Vanilla HTML5 + CSS3 + minimal JS (no frameworks, no build).
shared_assets: css/style.css — full theme: pastel palette, paper texture, dymo headers, washi tape, sticker cards, binder nav
js/app.js — toggles, role tabs, modals, calendar view switcher, news filter, locale toast, lunch week navigator, alert rotator

design.motif: Spiral-bound binder with pastel tabbed dividers, ruled notebook lines, crayon underlines, washi-tape highlights, dymo label headers, sticker cards with soft drop shadows.

typography.display: Recoleta-style rounded serif (Recoleta/Fraunces/Georgia fallback) for chunky headlines
typography.label: Courier New (dymo label-maker feel)

design.layout: Three-zone front page: persistent left-rail binder nav (Academics/Families/Staff/About), central sticker-card canvas, right-rail This Week + bell schedule + weather; two-column variant on interior pages.
design.background_texture: Cream paper with subtle ruled notebook lines via CSS gradient.

interactions_implemented: Binder left-rail nav with section labels and active-page highlight on every page
Schools directory Grid/Map toggle with pin overlay map and layer toggle legend
Role-tabbed portal sign-in (Parent / Student / Staff) with contextual help line and SSO buttons
Calendar view switcher (Month / Week / Agenda) with category filter pills and color-coded event chips
Board public-comment signup modal and absence-report modal opened from home + tool sticker
News category sticker-pill filter that hides/shows posts client-side
Locale dropdown that displays a translated toast confirmation (en/es/vi/so)
Lunch menu school-level tabs and week-navigator (◀/▶) that updates the displayed week label
Rotating alert strip headlines on the home page
Academics grade-band tab strip with live label sync to the subject heading
content_model_coverage: Campus — 7 schools with mascots, principals, addresses, phones, bell schedules, programs
CalendarEvent — month grid, week list, agenda views with categories and colors
BoardMember — 7 portraits with seats, terms, committees
BoardMeeting — Next-meeting hero plus searchable past-meetings table (agenda, minutes, video columns)
NewsPost — Featured story plus dated post list with thumbnails, reading-time chips, categories
MenuDay — Mon-Fri grid of Breakfast/Lunch/Snack with allergen legend
Program — Dual Language, STEAM, AVID, IB, CTE spotlight cards
BusRoute — Surfaced via alerts, address lookup, and map overlay legend
PolicyDoc — 1000-6000 series accordion in board page
Translation — Locale dropdown in topbar with 4 languages
accessibility_and_notes: Semantic header/main/aside/footer landmarks on every page
High-contrast ink-on-paper text with 2px borders for visual sharpness
Focusable controls retain native focus rings; modals close on backdrop click
Locale switcher visible in topbar of every page; ADA / Title IX statement linked from footer
